# Extração: 05-10X Google Ads - Preparation and Setup Checklist

- **Tipo:** PDF

---

Create a Google account (if you don’t have)
Create a Google Ads account (Smart or Expert)
• Set up billing information
• Give team members access (optional)
Create a YouTube account (for video ads)
Set up Google Merchant Center (if ecomm)
ACCOUNTS AND SETTINGS
Decide your primary Conversions (sales, leads, etc)
Create Conversion Actions and get pixel code(s)
Install conversion tracking pixel(s) on your website(s)
CONVERSION TRACKING
When complete… start setting up your first campaign!

Get yourself ready so you can start driving traffic quickly!
Choose which types of ads to run (all that apply)
• Search (text based ads on Google search results)
• Display (banner ads appearing on other websites)
• Video (video based ads primarily on YouTube)
• Local (specific to physical geo targeted locations)
• Shopping (product listings on various channels)
• App (promote an app on various channels)
• Discover (various properties such as gmail)
• Performance Max
Decide on campaign structure (see flowchart)
Research keywords using Google keyword tool
Do basic competitive research (all types of ads)
Decide on your daily and overall budget limits
STRATEGY AND RESEARCH
PREPARATION AND SETUP CHECKLIST
